_purpose: Web-mined LOGH canon character -> post/rank/affiliation roster, consolidated from 6 fan-wiki groups, deduped across groups and cross-referenced to the project roster (canon-character-posts.json) and IV-EX Korean names (ivex-reference.json).

characters.name_ja: アル・サレム
characters.post: Commander, 9th Fleet (796 UC invasion, flagship Palamedes); wounded at Battle of Alviss. (a.k.a. Al Salem)

characters.name_ja: アレックス・キャゼルヌ
characters.post: Chief logistics/rear-service officer; supply chief for the Yang Fleet and Iserlohn; Acting Secretary of Logistics. (a.k.a. Caselnes)
characters.affiliation: Rear Service / Logistics; Iserlohn Fortress; Joint Operations HQ

characters.name_ja: アレクサンドル・ビュコック
characters.post: Commander-in-Chief of the Space Fleet (Space Fleet Commander); commanded the Alliance fleet at Rantemario, Mar-Adetta and the final defense (died in last battle). Formerly 5th Fleet commander. (a.k.a. 'Bucock')
characters.affiliation: 5th Fleet → Space Fleet / Free Planets Star Fleet

characters.name_ja: アンドリュー・フォーク
characters.post: FPA staff officer who drafted the disastrous invasion of Imperial territory (796 UC); later brainwashed by the Terraist Church to assassinate Yang Wen-li
characters.affiliation: Free Planets Alliance; later Terraist pawn

characters.name_ja: アップルトン
characters.post: Commander, 8th Fleet (796 UC invasion, flagship Krishna); killed in action at the Battle of Amritsar

characters.name_ja: オーブリー・コクラン
characters.post: Commander of the Lykus (Lycus) supply base; his surrender to Müller affected the Battle of Vermillion

characters.name_ja: バグダッシュ
characters.post: Intelligence officer of the Yang Fleet (originally a National Salvation Military Council agent who switched sides). (a.k.a. Bagdash)

characters.name_ja: ボロディン
characters.post: Commander, 12th Fleet (flagship Perun); committed suicide after the Battle of Bolthorn (Amritsar campaign)

characters.name_ja: ブルース・アッシュビー
characters.post: Space Fleet Commander (745 UC); leader of the '730 Mafia'; died at the Second Battle of Tiamat

characters.name_ja: シャルロット・フィリス・キャゼルヌ
characters.post: Eldest daughter of Alex and Hortense Cazerne; carried correspondence between Yang and Cazerne

characters.name_ja: チュン・ウー・チェン
characters.post: Space Fleet Commander; later Chief of Staff under Bewcock in the final Imperial invasion
characters.affiliation: Free Planets Star Fleet (Space Fleet) / Joint Operations HQ

characters.name_ja: コーネリア・ウィンザー
characters.post: Secretary of Transportation (Transportation Committee Chairman); outspoken war-hawk advocating the invasion of the Empire; lost office after Amritsar
characters.affiliation: Free Planets Alliance High Council / Sanford Administration

characters.name_ja: ドーソン
characters.post: Chief of the Joint Operations Headquarters (penultimate holder); forced to resign after the 799 UC defeat

characters.name_ja: ダスティ・アッテンボロー
characters.post: Fleet/division commander under Yang Wen-li; senior commander of the Iserlohn Republic forces

characters.name_ja: ドワイト・グリーンヒル
characters.post: Chief of Staff of the 796 UC expeditionary force; later leader (chairman) of the National Salvation Military Council coup; father of Frederica Greenhill
characters.affiliation: Expeditionary force staff → National Salvation Military Council

characters.name_ja: エドウィン・フィッシャー
characters.post: Fleet-maneuver specialist and de facto vice-commander (deputy commander) of the Yang Fleet

characters.name_en: Enrique Martino Borges de Arantes e Oliveira
characters.name_ja: エンリケ・マルチノ・ボルジェス・デ・アランテス・エ・オリベイラ
characters.name_kr: 엔리케 마르티노 보르제스 데 아란테스 에 올리베이라
characters.post: University president and political adviser to the Alliance government; chief antagonistic interrogator at the secret hearings against Yang Wen-li (798 UC); aligned with the Trunicht faction
characters.affiliation: Free Planets Alliance government / Trunicht-aligned inquiry committee

characters.name_ja: フランチェスク・ロムスキー
characters.post: Chairman of the El Facil Revolutionary (Provisional) Government; declared El Facil's independence and recruited Yang Wen-li; former doctor turned politician
characters.affiliation: El Facil Revolutionary Government (Free Planets Alliance successor state)

characters.name_ja: フレデリカ・グリーンヒル・ヤン
characters.post: Yang Wen-li's adjutant/aide-de-camp; later civil leader of the Iserlohn Republic; daughter of Dwight Greenhill

characters.name_ja: フョードル・パトリチェフ
characters.post: Deputy Chief of Staff of the Yang Fleet (served in the 13th Fleet under Yang)

characters.name_ja: ヘンスロー
characters.post: Free Planets Alliance High Commissioner to Fezzan; manipulated by Kesserling/Rubinsky into reporting Yang-coup rumors to Heinessen

characters.name_ja: オルタンス・キャゼルヌ
characters.post: Wife of Alex Cazerne (née Milbelle); civilian supporter of Yang's circle on Heinessen

characters.name_ja: ホワン・ルイ
characters.post: Secretary of Human Resources (Human Resources Committee Chairman); later adviser to Chairman Rebelo; honest politician allied with Yang Wen-li
characters.affiliation: Free Planets Alliance High Council / Sanford, Trunicht & Rebelo Administrations

characters.name_ja: イワン・コーネフ
characters.post: Commander of the 2nd Spartanian Squadron; ace fighter pilot (Spartanian 155); killed at the Battle of Vermillion

characters.name_ja: ジェシカ・エドワーズ
characters.post: Member of the Alliance national legislative council (elected 796 UC, Terneuzen district); leader of the Citizens' Anti-War Union (Edwards Committee); peace activist
characters.affiliation: Free Planets Alliance legislature / Citizens' Anti-War Union

characters.name_ja: ジョアン・レベロ
characters.post: Supreme Chairman of the High Council (final holder; the Rebelo Administration); formerly Secretary of the Treasury (Finance Committee Chairman)
characters.affiliation: Free Planets Alliance High Council / Rebelo Administration

characters.name_ja: ヨブ・トリューニヒト
characters.post: Supreme Chairman of the High Council (formerly Secretary of Defence / National Defence Committee member); leader of the pro-war Trunicht faction; later defected to the Empire (Neue Land Senior Council Official)
characters.affiliation: Free Planets Alliance High Council / Trunicht Administration; covertly Terraist Church; later Galactic Empire

characters.name_ja: ジョン・ドリンカー・コープ
characters.post: Star Fleet Vice Commander (deputy commander of the Space Fleet); member of the '730 Mafia' generation; died 750 UC

characters.name_ja: ユリアン・ミンツ
characters.post: Yang's ward and aide; Spartanian pilot; later military commander of the Iserlohn Republic forces

characters.name_ja: ラザール・ロボス
characters.post: Commander-in-Chief of the Space Fleet (Space Fleet Commander); overall commander of the 796 UC invasion of the Empire (Amritsar campaign). (a.k.a. Lazar/Lazard Lobos)

characters.name_ja: ルフェーブル
characters.post: Commander, 3rd Fleet (796 UC invasion of the Empire); killed in action

characters.name_ja: ルグランジュ
characters.post: Commander, 11th Fleet during the 797 UC coup; fought Yang's forces, committed suicide after defeat

characters.name_ja: ライオネル・モートン
characters.post: Commander, 14th Fleet (flagship Achilleus); served at the Battle of the Corridor

characters.name_ja: マヌエル・ジョアン・パトリチオ
characters.post: Supreme Chairman of the High Council (Patricio Administration, from 639 UC); earlier reformist chairman devoted to the Alliance
characters.affiliation: Free Planets Alliance High Council / Patricio Administration

characters.name_ja: マリノ
characters.post: Captain of the Hyperion; later commander of the Marino Squadron (flagship Mauffesse) under the Yang Fleet

characters.name_ja: ムーア
characters.post: Commander, 6th Fleet (Battle of Astarte, flagship Pergamon); killed in action at Astarte

characters.name_ja: ムライ
characters.post: Chief of Staff of the Yang Fleet / Iserlohn Garrison

characters.name_ja: ネグロポンティ
characters.post: FPA Secretary of Defence (succeeding Trunicht); presided over the hearings against Yang Wen-li (798 UC); later president of a state hydrogen-energy corporation

characters.name_ja: グエン・キム・ホア
characters.post: Founder and first leader of the Free Planets Alliance (successor to Arle Heinessen); honorary president of the Heinessen Memorial Association

characters.name_ja: グエン・バン・ヒュー
characters.post: Squadron/division commander at Iserlohn Fortress during the Alliance occupation; killed after the Eighth Battle of Iserlohn

characters.name_ja: オリビエ・ポプラン
characters.post: Spartanian wing commander (ace pilot) of the Yang Fleet; 200+ kills
characters.affiliation: Yang Fleet (Spartanian fighter corps) → Iserlohn Republic

characters.name_ja: パエッタ
characters.post: Commander, 2nd Fleet (Battle of Astarte, flagship Patroklos); later Commander, 1st Fleet

characters.name_ja: パストーレ
characters.post: Commander, 4th Fleet (Battle of Astarte, flagship Leonidas); killed in action at Astarte. (a.k.a. Pastoll)

characters.name_ja: 憂国騎士団
characters.post: Ultranationalist paramilitary / secret police death squad commanded by Job Trunicht; enforced pro-war policies through coercion, extortion and murder

characters.name_ja: ライナー・ブルームハルト
characters.post: Rosen Ritter company/division officer under Schönkopf (Yang Fleet ground forces)

characters.name_ja: ラルフ・カールセン
characters.post: Commander, 15th Fleet; rose through the ranks without attending the military academy

characters.name_ja: ラムゼイ・ワーツ
characters.post: Squadron commander (~2,500 ships, 794 UC); killed in a skirmish with Reinhard before the Sixth Battle of Iserlohn

characters.name_ja: ロックウェル
characters.post: Last chief of the Joint Operations Headquarters of the Free Planets Star Fleet; led the mutiny that killed Chairman Rebelo to appease the Empire (800 UC)

characters.name_ja: ロイヤル・サンフォード
characters.post: Supreme Chairman of the High Council (head of state); the Sanford Administration
characters.affiliation: Free Planets Alliance High Council / Sanford Administration

characters.name_ja: サンドル・アラルコン
characters.post: Fleet/squadron commander (flagship Marduk); killed after the Eighth Battle of Iserlohn (798 UC)

characters.name_ja: シドニー・シトレ
characters.post: Chief of the Joint Operations Headquarters (top uniformed officer); retired after the Battle of Amritsar (796 UC)

characters.name_ja: スーン・スール
characters.post: Staff officer of the Yang Fleet (formerly Bewcock's adjutant)
characters.affiliation: Yang Fleet → El Facil Revolutionary Govt → Iserlohn Republic

characters.name_ja: ウランフ
characters.post: Commander, 10th Fleet; skilled rearguard commander, killed in 796 UC at the Battle of Lügen. (a.k.a. Uranff)

characters.name_ja: ウォルター・アイランズ
characters.post: Secretary of Defence (Defense Committee Chairman) until May 799 UC; obtained post by bribery, later supported the Star Fleet's last stand

characters.name_ja: ワルター・フォン・シェーンコップ
characters.post: Commander of the Rosen Ritter armored grenadier regiment; Fortress Commander of Iserlohn (defected from the Galactic Empire)
characters.affiliation: Rosen Ritter regiment / Iserlohn Fortress (Yang Fleet)

characters.name_ja: ウィレム・ホーランド
characters.post: Commander, 11th Fleet; killed in 795 UC at the Third Battle of Tiamat

characters.name_ja: ヤン・ウェンリー
characters.post: Commander, 13th Fleet (later Yang Fleet); Commander of the EFRRF; Hero of El Facil; conqueror of Iserlohn Fortress
characters.affiliation: 13th Fleet → Yang Fleet / Iserlohn Garrison → El Facil Revolutionary Reserve Force (EFRRF)

characters.name_ja: ド・ヴィリエ
characters.post: Archbishop and acting general secretary of the Terraist Church; de facto leader after the Grand Bishop's death; directed assassinations of Yang, Reinhard, and Wahlen

characters.name_ja: デグスビイ
characters.post: Bishop of the Terraist Church; intermediary between the Church and Landesherr Rubinsky; later an apostate

characters.name_ja: 大主教
characters.post: Official head of the Terraist Church and effective ruler of Terra; ordered the self-destruction of Terraist HQ (799 UC). Personal name never revealed in canon.

characters.name_ja: アーダルベルト・フォン・ファーレンハイト
characters.post: Fleet commander (flagship Asgrimm); ex-Lippstadt League admiral who joined Reinhard; died at the Battle of the Corridor
characters.rank: Fleet Admiral (posthumous); High Admiral in service
characters.affiliation: Galactic Empire / New Galactic Empire — Fahrenheit Fleet

characters.name_ja: アンネローゼ・フォン・グリューネワルト
characters.post: Concubine of Kaiser Friedrich IV; elder sister of Reinhard von Lohengramm (née Annerose von Müsel)

characters.name_ja: アンスバッハ
characters.post: Aide / personal staff officer to Duke Otho von Braunschweig; attempted to assassinate Reinhard (killed Kircheis)

characters.name_ja: アントン・フェルナー
characters.post: Staff officer under Duke Braunschweig in the Lippstadt League (attempted assassination of Reinhard); later Oberstein's assistant after defecting to Reinhard
characters.rank: Rear Admiral (final; served as Captain under Braunschweig during the Lippstadt Rebellion)

characters.name_ja: アントン・ヒルマー・フォン・シャフト
characters.post: Head / Inspector General of the Imperial Science and Technology Division (proposed mobile Geiersburg Fortress)
characters.affiliation: Imperial Science and Technology Division (Goldenbaum-Dynasty loyalist; not a Lippstadt noble)

characters.name_ja: アルツール・フォン・シュトライト
characters.post: Senior adjutant (chief aide-de-camp) to Kaiser Reinhard; earlier security adviser to Duke von Braunschweig

characters.name_ja: アウグスト・ザムエル・ワーレン
characters.post: Fleet commander (flagship Salamander); led detached operations including the Phezzan/Earth-area campaign
characters.affiliation: Galactic Empire / New Galactic Empire — Wahlen Fleet

characters.name_ja: ベルンハルト・フォン・シュナイダー
characters.post: Leading adjutant and close confidant of High Admiral Merkatz (within the Lippstadt forces)
characters.affiliation: Lippstadt League (Merkatz's staff) — later FPA / Imperial Legitimate Government / Iserlohn Republic

characters.name_ja: ベルンハイム
characters.post: Minister of Protocol / Court (Palace) Affairs (from 799 UC / 1 NIC)
characters.affiliation: New Galactic Empire cabinet (Goldenlowe) under Kaiser Reinhard

characters.name_ja: ブルックドルフ
characters.post: Minister of Justice (first Minister of Justice of the New Galactic Empire, from 799 UC / 1 NIC)
characters.affiliation: New Galactic Empire cabinet (Goldenlowe) under Kaiser Reinhard

characters.name_ja: ブルーノ・フォン・ジルバーベルヒェ
characters.post: Minister of Industry / Public Works (from 799 UC / 1 NIC)
characters.affiliation: New Galactic Empire cabinet (Goldenlowe) under Kaiser Reinhard

characters.name_ja: コルネリアス・ルッツ
characters.post: Fleet commander; later Commander/Garrison of Iserlohn Fortress; died protecting Kaiserin Hildegard
characters.rank: Fleet Admiral (posthumous); High Admiral in service
characters.affiliation: Galactic Empire / New Galactic Empire — Lutz Fleet

characters.name_ja: エーレンベルク
characters.post: Chief of Military Affairs (former) — one of three military chiefs of staff under Kaiser Friedrich IV
characters.affiliation: Imperial Ministry of Military Affairs (Goldenbaum old guard)

characters.name_ja: エルフリーデ・フォン・コールラウシュ
characters.post: Grand-niece of Klaus von Lichtenlade; mother of Reuenthal's son Felix; used by Rubinsky/Dominique in the Reuenthal affair

characters.name_ja: エリザベート・フォン・ブラウンシュバイク
characters.post: Imperial granddaughter and succession candidate in the Imperial Civil War (backed by Duke Otho von Braunschweig)
characters.affiliation: Goldenbaum imperial house (granddaughter of Friedrich IV); House Braunschweig

characters.name_ja: エルネスト・メックリンガー
characters.post: Rear-area / rear-line forces commander; earlier Reinhard's fleet chief of staff; known as the 'Artist-Admiral'
characters.rank: High Admiral (Fleet Admiral on Reinhard's deathbed recommendation)
characters.affiliation: Galactic Empire / New Galactic Empire — Lohengramm admiralty

characters.name_ja: エルンスト・フォン・アイゼナッハ
characters.post: Fleet commander (flagship Vissarr); the 'Silent Admiral' who commanded by gesture
characters.affiliation: Galactic Empire / New Galactic Empire — Eisenach Fleet

characters.name_ja: エルウィン・ヨーゼフ2世
characters.post: Kaiser (Emperor) of the Galactic Empire, 37th Goldenbaum monarch (child puppet-emperor, grandson of Friedrich IV)

characters.name_ja: オイゲン・リヒター
characters.post: Minister of Finance (from 799 UC / 1 NIC); gave up his noble title to serve Reinhard
characters.affiliation: New Galactic Empire cabinet (Goldenlowe) under Kaiser Reinhard

characters.name_ja: フレーゲル
characters.post: Lippstadt League fleet commander serving his uncle Duke Braunschweig; formerly served under Fleet Admiral Mückenberger at Iserlohn; flagship Wilhelmina

characters.name_ja: フランツ・フォン・マリーンドルフ
characters.post: Minister of State (Prime Minister) of the Goldenlowe Dynasty under Kaiser Reinhard; father of Hildegard von Mariendorf
characters.affiliation: New Galactic Empire cabinet (Goldenlowe); formerly Goldenbaum civil government

characters.name_ja: フリードリヒ・フォン・ゴールデンバウム4世
characters.post: Kaiser (Emperor) of the Galactic Empire, 36th Goldenbaum monarch

characters.name_ja: フリッツ・ヨーゼフ・ビッテンフェルト
characters.post: Commander of the Schwarz Lanzenreiter (Black Lancers) fleet; flagship Königs Tiger. NOTE: also romanized 'Wittenfeld' in the original novels — same character.
characters.rank: Fleet Admiral (posthumously/late-series; High Admiral for most of the series)
characters.affiliation: Galactic Empire / New Galactic Empire — Black Lancers

characters.name_ja: グレゴール・フォン・ミュッケンベルガー
characters.post: Commander-in-Chief of the Imperial Space Armada / Chief of the Space Fleet (one of three military chiefs of staff under Kaiser Friedrich IV)
characters.affiliation: Imperial Space Armada / Imperial High Command (Goldenbaum old guard)

characters.name_ja: ギュンター・キスリング
characters.post: Commander of the Imperial Guard (Kaiser Reinhard's personal bodyguard force)

characters.name_ja: ハンス・エドアルド・ベルゲングリューン
characters.post: Chief of Staff of the Reuenthal Fleet; earlier served as a staff officer under Kircheis (Castrop Rebellion)
characters.affiliation: Galactic Empire / New Galactic Empire — Reuenthal Fleet staff

characters.name_ja: ハインリッヒ・フォン・キュンメル
characters.post: Terminally-ill Imperial baron (cousin of Hildegard) manipulated by the Terraist Church into the Seffle-particle assassination attempt on Kaiser Reinhard (Kümmel Incident, 799 UC)

characters.name_ja: ヘルムート・レンネンカンプ
characters.post: Fleet commander; later Imperial High Commissioner to the subjugated Free Planets Alliance, stationed on Heinessen
characters.affiliation: Galactic Empire / New Galactic Empire — Lennenkampf Fleet

characters.name_ja: ハイドリッヒ・ラング
characters.post: Chief of the Internal Security Department (secret police) of both the Goldenbaum and Goldenlöwe regimes; conspired with Rubinsky to frame Boltik

characters.name_ja: ヒルデガルド・フォン・マリーンドルフ（フォン・ローエングラム）
characters.post: Chief secretary and advisor to Reinhard von Lohengramm; later Kaiserin and Regent of the New Galactic Empire for Alexander Siegfried

characters.name_ja: ユルゲン・オッファー・フォン・ペグニッツ
characters.post: Regent for the infant Kaiserin Katharin Katchen I; signed the instrument of abdication ending the Goldenbaum Dynasty
characters.affiliation: Galactic Empire civil government (late Goldenbaum); imperial court

characters.name_ja: カール・ブラッケ
characters.post: Minister of Civil Affairs (from 799 UC / 1 NIC); leader of the 'knowledge and civilization' reform movement; gave up his noble title to serve Reinhard
characters.affiliation: New Galactic Empire cabinet (Goldenlowe) under Kaiser Reinhard

characters.name_ja: カール・グスタフ・ケンプ
characters.post: Commander of the expeditionary force that deployed the mobile Geiersburg Fortress against Iserlohn (Eighth Battle of Iserlohn, 798 UC); died in the attack

characters.name_ja: カール・ロベルト・シュタインメッツ
characters.post: Fleet commander (flagship Vonkel); guarded the Iserlohn Corridor approach; died at the Battle of the Corridor
characters.rank: Fleet Admiral (posthumous); High Admiral in service
characters.affiliation: Galactic Empire / New Galactic Empire — Steinmetz Fleet

characters.name_ja: カザリン・ケートヒェン1世
characters.post: Kaiserin (Empress) of the Galactic Empire, 38th and final Goldenbaum monarch (infant; signed the abdication ending the dynasty)

characters.name_ja: クラウス・フォン・リヒテンラーデ
characters.post: Minister of State (Staatsrat) and acting Prime Minister of the Galactic Empire; regent for Erwin Josef II
characters.affiliation: Galactic Empire civil government (Goldenbaum); imperial court

characters.name_ja: ルートヴィヒ・フォン・ゴールデンバウム
characters.post: Crown Prince of the Galactic Empire (predeceased Friedrich IV; father of Erwin Josef II)
characters.affiliation: Goldenbaum imperial house (son of Friedrich IV)

characters.name_ja: マグダレーナ・フォン・ウェストファーレ
characters.post: High-noble baroness at Friedrich IV's court (Neue Sanssouci); close friend of Countess Annerose (Gaiden side-story character)

characters.name_ja: マインホーフ
characters.post: Chief Cabinet Secretary
characters.affiliation: New Galactic Empire cabinet (Goldenlowe) under Kaiser Reinhard

characters.name_ja: ナイトハルト・ミュラー
characters.post: Fleet commander ('Iron Wall Müller'); commander of the Müller Fleet (flagship Perceval); regarded as Reinhard's third-greatest admiral
characters.affiliation: Galactic Empire / New Galactic Empire — Müller Fleet

characters.name_ja: オスカー・フォン・ロイエンタール
characters.post: Governor-General of the Neue Land (former Free Planets Alliance territory) with control over half the Imperial Fleet; one of the 'Twin Pillars' of the Goldenlöwe Dynasty
characters.affiliation: Galactic Empire / New Galactic Empire — Reuenthal Fleet

characters.name_ja: オスマイヤー
characters.post: Minister of the Interior / Internal Affairs (from 799 UC / 1 NIC)
characters.affiliation: New Galactic Empire cabinet (Goldenlowe) under Kaiser Reinhard

characters.name_ja: オトフリート5世
characters.post: Kaiser (Emperor) of the Galactic Empire, 35th Goldenbaum monarch; father of Friedrich IV; oversaw construction of Iserlohn Fortress

characters.name_ja: オットー・フォン・ブラウンシュヴァイク
characters.post: Leader (supreme commander) of the Lippstadt League / confederated aristocrat forces; commanded from flagship Berlin

characters.name_ja: オフレッサー
characters.post: Armoured Grenadier Commander — highest ground-force commander, nominal command of all Imperial armoured grenadiers; led ground defence of Rentenberg Fortress

characters.name_ja: パウル・フォン・オーベルシュタイン
characters.post: Minister of Military Affairs (Secretary of Defense) of the New Galactic Empire; Reinhard's chief strategist/political advisor
characters.affiliation: Galactic Empire / New Galactic Empire — Lohengramm administration

characters.name_ja: ラインハルト・フォン・ローエングラム
characters.post: Kaiser Reinhard I, founder and Emperor of the New Galactic Empire (Goldenlowe Dynasty); previously Imperial Prime Minister / Imperial Commander-in-Chief
characters.affiliation: Goldenlowe Dynasty (New Galactic Empire, imperial house)

characters.name_en: Rudolf von Goldenbaum (Rudolf I, the Great)
characters.name_ja: ルドルフ・フォン・ゴールデンバウム
characters.post: Founding Kaiser (Emperor) of the Galactic Empire and Goldenbaum Dynasty, 1st monarch

characters.name_ja: ザビーネ・フォン・リッテンハイム
characters.post: Imperial granddaughter and succession candidate in the Imperial Civil War (backed by Marquis Wilhelm von Littenheim)
characters.affiliation: Goldenbaum imperial house (granddaughter of Friedrich IV); House Littenheim

characters.name_ja: ゼーフェルト
characters.post: Minister of Education / Culture (from July 799 UC / 1 NIC)
characters.affiliation: New Galactic Empire cabinet (Goldenlowe) under Kaiser Reinhard

characters.name_ja: ジークフリード・キルヒアイス
characters.post: Reinhard's deputy/second-in-command and closest friend; fleet commander (flagship Barbarossa); commanded the Imperial mainland defense during the Lippstadt War

characters.name_ja: ゾンバルト
characters.post: Fleet officer under Reinhard; charged with escorting supply ships to the Uruvasi base before the Battle of Vermilion; defeated by Yang and punished by Reinhard

characters.name_ja: シュターデン
characters.post: Lippstadt League fleet commander (led the Odin-capture expedition); former instructor of strategic theory at the Imperial Officer Academy; defeated at the Battle of Altena

characters.name_ja: シュタインホフ
characters.post: Chief of High Command (former) — one of three military chiefs of staff under Kaiser Friedrich IV

characters.name_ja: テオドール・フォン・リュッケ
characters.post: Junior adjutant to Fleet Admiral / Kaiser Reinhard von Lohengramm
characters.affiliation: Galactic Empire / New Galactic Empire — Reinhard's staff

characters.name_ja: ウルリッヒ・ケスラー
characters.post: Commissioner/Chief of the Imperial Military Police and Capital Defense (security of Odin/the new capital)
characters.affiliation: Galactic Empire / New Galactic Empire — Military Police

characters.name_ja: ウィルヘルム・フォン・リッテンハイム
characters.post: Imperial Marquis; son-in-law of Friedrich IV (husband of Princess Christine); backer of his daughter Sabine's claim; second-ranking noble at court
characters.affiliation: High Nobility / imperial court (Goldenbaum); Lippstadt League

characters.name_ja: ウィリバルト・ヨアヒム・フォン・メルカッツ
characters.post: Commander-in-Chief of the Lippstadt Allied Forces during the Imperial Civil War (coerced); later chief of staff of El Facil Revolutionary forces
characters.rank: High Admiral (later Fleet Admiral, Imperial government-in-exile)
characters.affiliation: Lippstadt League (military commander) — later Free Planets Alliance / Imperial Legitimate Government / Iserlohn Republic

characters.name_ja: ウォルフガング・ミッターマイヤー
characters.post: Supreme Commander of the Imperial Space Fleet (Chief Commander of the Fleet) under Kaiser Reinhard; one of the 'Twin Pillars' of the Goldenlöwe Dynasty; the 'Gale Wolf'
characters.affiliation: Galactic Empire / New Galactic Empire — Mittermeyer Fleet

characters.name_ja: アドリアン・ルビンスキー
characters.post: 5th Landesherr (Land-lord) of the Dominion of Fezzan; the 'Black Fox of Fezzan'

characters.name_ja: ボリス・コーネフ
characters.post: Independent Fezzani merchant captain (ships Berezka and The Undutiness); secretary at the Fezzani High Commission on Heinessen; ally of the Yang Fleet

characters.name_ja: ドミニク・サン・ピエール
characters.post: Fezzani singer and dancer; long-time companion of Landesherr Adrian Rubinsky

characters.name_ja: カーレ・ウィロック
characters.post: Fezzani merchant and smuggler; associate of Boris Konev; pilot who smuggled Julian Mintz off occupied Fezzan

characters.name_ja: レオポルド・ラープ
characters.post: 1st Landesherr and founder of the autonomous Dominion of Fezzan (Terraist front figure)

characters.name_ja: マリネスク
characters.post: First officer and main administrator of Boris Konev's crew; merchant and smuggler

characters.name_ja: ニコラス・ボルテック
characters.post: Governor-General of Fezzan (New Galactic Empire); formerly last Fezzani High Commissioner to the Galactic Empire
characters.affiliation: Dominion of Fezzan; later New Galactic Empire

characters.name_ja: ルパート・ケッセルリンク
characters.post: Secretary of the Landesherr (right-hand advisor to Adrian Rubinsky, his father)

characters.name_ja: ワレンコフ
characters.post: 4th Landesherr of the Dominion of Fezzan (Rubinsky's predecessor; assassinated by the Terraist Church)
